SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: !!! This sequence captures SaveApplicant hygene code
!!!! we must fill in the start date if it does not exist
!!! make sure nested tags are clean

LOOP.COMMENT: !!! make sure country is filled in

MAP.NAME: $null
MAP.COMMENT: set the country in the address if null

MAP.NAME: $null
MAP.COMMENT: set the status to enabled in the address if null
set the status to enabled in the address if 0

BRANCH.COMMENT: !!! make sure empty address tags are clean

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: !!! REMOVE: This prevents more than one billing company from being saved due to a cyence defect

SEQUENCE.NAME: $null
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: No company details to clean up

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: !!! This sequence captures SaveApplicant hygene code
!!! make sure nested tags are clean

LOOP.COMMENT: !!! make sure country is filled in

MAP.NAME: $null
MAP.COMMENT: set the country in the address if null

MAP.NAME: $null
MAP.COMMENT: set the status to enabled in the address if null
set the status to enabled in the address if 0

BRANCH.COMMENT: !!! make sure empty address tags are clean

SEQUENCE.NAME: $null
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: No consumer details to clean up
